description: 10yr backtest (2016-03-2026-03). Sharpe 0.69, PF 1.33, annual 0.3%. VIX breakdown: Mid(15-25) 168 trades WR=85%, High(>25) 35 trades WR=74%.

Tightening VIX band to 18-25 dramatically reduces trades (203→95) and Sharpe collapses (0.69→0.12). The 15-25 mid-range still includes lots of bad weeks; the high-VIX weeks (>25) actually provided diversification. Conclusion: keep VIX 15-30.
